profile.title: Getting to know you better
profile.firstTime: Are you a first time user?

welcome.title: Welcome to the Sound Exploration
welcome.description: You're about to experience a series of listening exploration crafted just for you. We'll quickly guide you through how it works.

tutorial.step1: You are about to move through a series of everyday moments, like passing through parts of your day.
tutorial.step2: We will play each scene twice. Listen carefully — one version at a time.
tutorial.step3: After listening, press and hold the highlighted objects to hear their sounds.
tutorial.step4: You can drag the divider left or right to reveal more of each version. Try it now.

preference.afterExploring: After exploring, how strong is your preference now?
preference.afterExploringWhich: After exploring — which version do you still prefer?
preference.exploreScene: Explore the scene and interact with objects.
preference.replayOptions: Replay options: Version 1, Version 2, or both.

complete.title: You've completed your sound journey!
complete.description: Thank you for exploring the world of sound with us. Your responses have helped us build your Digital Twin. You can now review your personalised sound profile.

headphones.title: Before we begin
headphones.description: Before we begin, we recommend using headphones. How would you like to connect them?
headphones.wired: By wire — Plug in your headphones

headphones.title: Before we begin
headphones.subtitle: Last touch before we begin — we recommend using headphones. How would you like to connect them?
headphones.wired: By wire — Plug in your headphones

replay.question: Do you want to listen to one or both variations again?

imagePicker.title: What about your daily life?
imagePicker.step1: Pick what matters most to you — 1 / 2
imagePicker.step2: Pick what matters most to you — 2 / 2

sections.listenDifferently: Everyone listens differently. Let's understand your world.
